---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something new or an improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear, one-line summary of the feature.

## Problem
What problem does this solve? What's missing today?

## Proposed Solution
How should this work? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, links, or references.
